import ReadParameters from '../../../snippets/tempo/read-parameters.mdx'

# `validator.getOwner`

Gets the owner of the validator config precompile.

## Usage

:::code-group

```ts twoslash [example.ts]
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"2d9ee0c07a2f3e293a827594c6ddb761fda878e617dd9a8596666760c28b3914","data":""}
import { client } from './viem.config'

const owner = await client.validator.getOwner()

console.log('Owner:', owner)
// @log: Owner: 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f0bEbb
```

```ts twoslash [viem.config.ts] filename="viem.config.ts"
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"3f82347fcf4da6ca9f26b8ababa48ae892a78346e0b2f4d598526dc994b98c3c","data":""}
// [!include ~/snippets/tempo/viem.config.ts:setup]
```

:::

## Return Type

```ts
type ReturnType = Address // Owner address
```

<ReadParameters />
